hero.tagline: An embeddable, scriptable Windows XP desktop for React. This page doesn't describe the engine — it runs it, and drives itself with the same public API you get.
hero.powerOn: Click to power on the desktop
greeter.title: Welcome - Notepad
greeter.body:
This is not a video.
Drag this window. →

Everything on this page is the real
@caoergou/windows-xp engine — and it's
typing this by driving itself through its
public ref handle (XPHandle).

embed it. script it. make it yours.
act2.title: Three Desktops, One Engine
act2.body: Windows XP is only the first OS package. The same engine renders a late-night net-café desktop and a fictional teal OS — swap the culture package, keep the engine.
monitor.xpDesc: The faithful baseline. Pixel-accurate chrome, real windows, real apps.
monitor.netcafeDesc: QQ, 360, Thunder, Kugou — the 2005–2007 Chinese-internet mood and its ARG puzzles.
monitor.echoDesc: A made-up teal OS with a Dock — proof the shell is a definable package, not a hard-coded skin.
act4.title: Pick a world and step in
door.zh.title: 中文桌面 · Net-café
door.zh.desc: QQ 上线、360 体检、迅雷下载、暴风影音 — a 2000s 中国互联网 desktop.
door.en.title: English desktop
door.en.desc: Winamp, Norton AntiVirus, uTorrent, iTunes, Office — the Western 2000s PC.
roadmap.title: Where this is going
roadmap.1: Embeddable engine: events, imperative ref, content injection, culture packages
roadmap.2: Scenario runtime — declarative triggers/flags for scriptable ARG stories
roadmap.3: OS packages beyond XP (Win7 / macOS-like / defineOS)
roadmap.4: LLM bridges: an agent-perceivable, agent-operable desktop
glass.title: Watch it think
glass.body: Every action inside the desktop is a typed event. Touch the desktop on the left and the real onEvent feed scrolls by on the right — the same stream your app subscribes to. Then drive it, or rewrite its whole world.
glass.hauntHint: drive the desktop over the ref handle
glass.hauntBody: The site is driving this desktop for you, via XPHandle.
glass.hauntDoneBody: Every one of those actions emitted a typed event — see the feed. →
glass.breakHint: trip a lock and watch file:unlock fire
glass.breakBody: The lock on secret.txt is about to trip. Watch the events on the right.
glass.tickerIdle: // touch the desktop — events will stream here
